summary: Comprehensive testing of Central Inventory app - all 10 features verified. Backend APIs (24/24 tests passed), Frontend UI flows verified including login, navigation, all pages load correctly, and logout works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features verified. Backend APIs working via proxy to preprod.mygenie.online. Frontend pages: Login, Operations Hub, Hierarchy Summary (Master Stores + Outlets tabs), Pending Queues (Approvals, Ready to Dispatch, Receives, My Requests tabs), History & Ledger (Transfer History + Stock Ledger tabs) all load correctly. Logout functionality works.

features_tested.1_login_page_loads: PASS - Login page loads at /login with email, password inputs and Sign In button
features_tested.2_login_with_credentials: PASS - abhishek@kalabahia.com / Qplazm@10 logs in successfully
features_tested.3_operations_hub_pending_counts: PASS - Shows Pending Approvals (3), Ready to Dispatch (1), Pending Receives (0)
features_tested.4_sidebar_navigation: PASS - Operations Hub, Hierarchy Summary, Pending Queues, History & Ledger all navigate correctly
features_tested.5_hierarchy_summary_master_stores: PASS - Shows DemoCentral1 (57 sent, 175 received, 6 transactions) and DemoCentral2 (78 sent, 10 received, 5 transactions)
features_tested.6_hierarchy_summary_outlets: PASS - Shows DemoFranchise1-4 with transaction counts
features_tested.7_pending_queues_tabs: PASS - Approvals (3), Ready to Dispatch (1), Receives, My Requests tabs all work
features_tested.8_history_ledger_page: PASS - Transfer History shows 5 transfers, Stock Ledger tab works
features_tested.9_backend_api_root: PASS - /api/ returns 'Central Inventory API Proxy' message
features_tested.10_logout_functionality: PASS - Logout button works, redirects to login page
